hero.title: Our Story:
hero.desc: Bridging the gap between abstract syntax and human intuition. CodePulse transforms complex algorithmic sequences into interactive visual architectures.

visualLogic.title: Visual Logic
visualLogic.desc: We don't just show code; we expose the flow of data through multi-dimensional structures, making the invisible visible through real-time graph rendering.

interactiveLearning.title: Interactive Learning
interactiveLearning.desc: Animated visualizations for every data structure and algorithm operation. Each lesson includes interactive mini-games and supplementary explainer videos to reinforce understanding.

julian.bio: What is sleep? Just 24/7 coding and running

kai.bio: Trading three hours of sleep a day for time with the 2D world

kenny.bio: Soy milk is my favorite — muscles, muscles, muscles
